name: svelte-fragment-renderer
title: Svelte Fragment Renderer Host
description: A host that mounts xript UI fragments into a Svelte view layer. Hosts declare slots; mods contribute inert fragments rendered by the reference Svelte renderer.

log.description: Writes a message to the console.

counter.description: Functions for reading and mutating the shared counter.

increment.description: Increments the counter and returns the new value.

ui-mount.description: Mount UI fragments into application slots.
